info.name: Ardh Property Management API (Cookie Auth)
info.description: Postman Collection for ARDH Backend APIs relying strictly on HTTP-only cookies for authentication. No Bearer token headers required.

request.description: Authenticate user credentials. Backend sets the HTTP-only cookie 'token_key' upon success.
Get current profile of the logged-in user. Relies entirely on the 'token_key' cookie.
Resend a password reset OTP code. The OTP is set to 123456 by default.
Request a password reset OTP code. The OTP prints to the backend terminal log.
Verify the reset OTP code sent to your terminal.
Reset user password using verified OTP code.
Log out from the system and clear cookies.

query.description: Page number (defaults to 1)
Number of items per page (defaults to 10)
Search keyword matching Name, Email, or Phone
Filter by role. Allowed values: admin, property_manager, accountant, viewer
Filter by activity state: true or false

request.description: Retrieve all users with support for pagination, keyword search, and role/is_active filters.
Obtain single user record by their Unique ID.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Rajesh Kumar", // Full name of the user
    "email": "rajesh@example.com", // Unique email address
    "phone": "+91 9876543210", // Contact phone number
    "password": "P@ssw0rd", // Login password (minimum 6 characters)
    "confirmPassword": "P@ssw0rd", // Must match the password field
    "address": "Bangalore", // Physical home/office address
    "role": "admin", // User role: admin, property_manager, accountant, viewer
    "permissions": "dashboard,properties", // Comma-separated permissions from: dashboard, properties, finance, operations, admin
    "avatarURL": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde" // URL to avatar image
}

request.description: Creates a new user profile in the database. Accessible by Admin role.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Rajesh Kumar Updated", // Full name of the user
    "email": "rajesh@example.com", // Unique email address
    "phone": "+91 9876543210", // Contact phone number
    "address": "Bangalore North", // Physical home/office address
    "role": "admin", // User role: admin, property_manager, accountant, viewer
    "isActive": true, // Set to true to activate or false to deactivate user
    "permissions": "dashboard,properties", // Comma-separated permissions from: dashboard, properties, finance, operations, admin
    "avatarURL": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde" // URL to avatar image
}

request.description: Updates details for an existing user record.

header.description: Header to supply the admin password for deletion (uses the system delete password from Settings)

query.description: Admin password to verify deletion (uses the system delete password from Settings)

request.description: Flags a user record as soft-deleted by setting the DeletedAt timestamp. Requires the Admin password.
Toggles status of the user between Active and Inactive.

query.description: Page number (defaults to 1)
Number of items per page (defaults to 10)
Search keyword matching building_name, city, or state
Filter by building status: active, inactive

request.description: Retrieve all buildings with support for pagination, keyword search, and status filters.
Obtain single building record by its Unique ID.

body.raw:
{
    "buildingName": "Grand Plaza Towers", // Unique name of the building
    "address": "123 Skyline Boulevard", // Street address of the building
    "city": "New York", // City where the building is located
    "state": "NY", // State/Province where the building is located
    "country": "USA", // Country of the building
    "googleMapLink": "https://maps.google.com/?q=123+Skyline+Boulevard+New+York", // Map pin URL
    "totalFloors": 24, // Total number of floors in the building
    "parkingDetails": "Basement Level 1 & 2, 150 Slots Available", // Description of parking facilities
    "status": "active", // Building status: active, inactive
    "description": "Premium luxury residence building in Manhattan with scenic city views and standard amenities.", // Detailed overview of building
    "imageUrl": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545324418-cc1a3fa10c00" // URL to the building's exterior image
}

request.description: Creates a new building profile. Accessible by authenticated users. All fields are mandatory.

body.raw:
{
    "buildingName": "Grand Plaza Towers Updated", // Unique name of the building
    "address": "123 Skyline Boulevard Suite A", // Street address of the building
    "city": "New York", // City where the building is located
    "state": "NY", // State/Province where the building is located
    "country": "USA", // Country of the building
    "googleMapLink": "https://maps.google.com/?q=123+Skyline+Boulevard+New+York", // Map pin URL
    "totalFloors": 25, // Total number of floors in the building
    "parkingDetails": "Basement Level 1 & 2, 160 Slots Available", // Description of parking facilities
    "status": "active", // Building status: active, inactive
    "description": "Updated description for the luxury residence building.", // Detailed overview of building
    "imageUrl": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545324418-cc1a3fa10c00" // URL to the building's exterior image
}

request.description: Updates details for an existing building record.

header.description: Header to supply the admin password for deletion (uses the system delete password from Settings)

query.description: Admin password to verify deletion (uses the system delete password from Settings)

request.description: Flags a building record as soft-deleted by setting the deleted_at timestamp (requires settings adminPassword verification).
Retrieves the current application settings.

body.raw:
{
    "companyName": "Ardh Property Management", // Name of the company
    "companyEmail": "info@ardh.com", // General email for the company
    "phone": "+91 1234567890", // Phone number contact
    "address": "123 Main Street, Bangalore, India", // Company headquarters physical address
    "icon": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde", // URL or base64 string for the main application icon
    "fav": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde", // URL to the application favicon
    "adminPassword": "adminpassword" // Current admin password for validation (required to save changes)
}

request.description: Updates general settings. Requires the current admin password for validation.
Updates the system-wide admin password for deleting entities and updating settings.

query.description: Page number (defaults to 1)
Number of items per page (defaults to 10)
Search keyword matching EntityTitle
Filter by entity type: User, Building, etc.
Filter by start date of deletion (YYYY-MM-DD)
Filter by end date of deletion (YYYY-MM-DD)

request.description: Retrieve all soft-deleted records with support for pagination, search, start date, end date, and type filters.

variable.description: Unique identifier of the deleted history record (UUID)

request.description: Restore a soft-deleted record back to active status.

variable.description: Unique identifier of the deleted history record (UUID)

request.description: Permanently delete a deleted history record and the underlying entity.

variable.description: Unique identifier of the deleted history record (UUID)

request.description: Get detailed information including the serialized representation of the deleted entity.
Upload an image file (PNG, JPG, WEBP).
Upload a document file (PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, TXT, CSV).
Upload a tenant ID proof document (PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, JPEG, PNG).

variable.description: The unique ID (filename without/with extension) returned on upload

request.description: Delete the uploaded file from the storage directory.

item.name: Owners Management
item.description: API endpoints for Managing Property Owners.

query.description: Page number for pagination (defaults to 1)
Number of items per page (defaults to 10)
Search keyword matching full_name, email, phone, or city
Filter by owner status: Active, Inactive, Pending

request.description: Retrieves a paginated list of property owners with optional search and status filter.

item.name: O-02. Get Owner Details by ID

request.description: Retrieves details of a single property owner by unique ID.

body.raw:
{
    "fullName": "Rajesh Kumar", // Full name of the property owner
    "phone": "+91 9876543210", // Primary contact phone number
    "email": "rajesh.kumar@example.com", // Unique email address of the owner
    "city": "Bangalore", // City of residence/property
    "address": "789 Palm Avenue, Indiranagar", // Complete street address
    "idType": "Aadhar", // Government ID type: Aadhar, PanCard, or Passport (No dynamic fields needed; all types use idNumber)
    "idNumber": "1234-5678-9012", // Document number matching selected idType (e.g. Aadhar, PAN, or Passport number)
    "bankName": "HDFC Bank", // Bank name for payout deposits
    "accountNumber": "50100234567890", // Bank account number for payouts
    "ifscCode": "HDFC0001234", // Bank IFSC code
    "status": "Active", // Owner status: Active, Inactive, Pending
    "notes": "Primary owner for Grand Plaza Towers unit 101" // Optional additional notes
}

request.description: Creates a new property owner record.

body.raw:
{
    "fullName": "Rajesh Kumar", // Updated full name of the property owner
    "phone": "+91 9876543210", // Updated contact phone number
    "email": "rajesh.kumar@example.com", // Updated email address
    "city": "Bangalore", // Updated city
    "address": "789 Palm Avenue, Indiranagar", // Updated complete street address
    "idType": "Aadhar", // Updated government ID type: Aadhar, PanCard, or Passport (No dynamic fields needed; all types use idNumber)
    "idNumber": "1234-5678-9012", // Updated document number matching selected idType (e.g. Aadhar, PAN, or Passport number)
    "bankName": "HDFC Bank", // Updated bank name
    "accountNumber": "50100234567890", // Updated bank account number
    "ifscCode": "HDFC0001234", // Updated IFSC code
    "status": "Active", // Updated owner status: Active, Inactive, Pending
    "notes": "Updated owner notes and contact details" // Optional updated notes
}

request.description: Updates an existing property owner record.

header.description: Header to supply the admin password for deletion (uses system delete password from Settings)

query.description: Admin password query parameter to verify deletion

request.description: Soft-deletes an owner by setting deleted_at timestamp and recording soft-delete history. Requires Admin password.

item.name: Apartments Management
item.description: API endpoints for Managing Individual Apartment Units within Buildings.

query.description: Page number for pagination (defaults to 1)
Number of items per page (defaults to 10)
Search keyword matching flat_number, nestaway_id, parking_slot, building name, or owner name
Filter by Building ID (UUID)
Filter by Owner ID (UUID)
Filter by Apartment Type: 1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK, 4BHK, Penthouse, Studio

request.description: Retrieves a paginated list of apartments with optional keyword search and filters.

item.name: AP-02. Get Apartment Details by ID

request.description: Retrieves complete details of a single apartment unit.

body.raw:
{
    "buildingId": "replace-with-building-uuid", // Foreign key to existing building record
    "ownerId": "replace-with-owner-uuid", // Foreign key to existing owner record
    "nestawayId": "NA-101", // External system identifier
    "flatNumber": "A-101", // Flat/unit number (must be unique within the building)
    "floor": 1, // Floor number (0 for Ground Floor)
    "apartmentType": "2BHK", // Apartment configuration: 1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK, 4BHK, Penthouse, Studio
    "areaSqft": 1250.50, // Total carpet area in square feet
    "bedrooms": 2, // Number of bedrooms
    "bathrooms": 2, // Number of bathrooms
    "hasBalcony": true, // Balcony availability flag (true/false)
    "parkingSlot": "P-101", // Parking space identifier
    "expectedRent": 25000.00, // Monthly expected rent amount
    "maintenanceCharge": 2500.00, // Monthly maintenance charges
    "waterCharge": 500.00 // Monthly water charges
}

request.description: Creates a new apartment unit under a specified building and owner.

body.raw:
{
    "buildingId": "replace-with-building-uuid", // Foreign key to building
    "ownerId": "replace-with-owner-uuid", // Foreign key to owner
    "nestawayId": "NA-101", // Updated external system identifier
    "flatNumber": "A-101", // Updated flat/unit number
    "floor": 1, // Updated floor number
    "apartmentType": "2BHK", // Updated apartment type: 1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK, 4BHK, Penthouse, Studio
    "areaSqft": 1250.50, // Updated area in sqft
    "bedrooms": 2, // Updated bedroom count
    "bathrooms": 2, // Updated bathroom count
    "hasBalcony": true, // Updated balcony availability
    "parkingSlot": "P-101", // Updated parking slot
    "expectedRent": 26000.00, // Updated expected rent
    "maintenanceCharge": 2500.00, // Updated maintenance charge
    "waterCharge": 500.00 // Updated water charge
}

request.description: Updates an existing apartment record.

header.description: Header to supply the admin password for deletion (uses system delete password from Settings)

query.description: Admin password query parameter to verify deletion

request.description: Soft-deletes an apartment record by setting deleted_at timestamp and recording soft-delete history. Requires Admin password.
